report.stage: Observation suggests characteristics of a Grade II/III lesion, requiring histopathological confirmation.
report.summary: Imaging reveals a mass consistent with the predicted Pituitary. Mass effect and localized edema dynamics are reflected in the generated radiomics analysis. This represents a complex case requiring immediate specialist intervention.
report.precautions: Recommended tight monitoring for increased intracranial pressure. Immediate consultation with neuro-oncology required. Avoid strenuous activities.
report.future_steps: Recommend structural MRI with gadolinium contrast for refined visualization and biopsy planning.
